required.mechanism: Claude Code scheduled task (cron), not a Cursor Automation
required.caveat: Runs only while the Claude app is open at fire time; if closed, it runs on next launch instead. This is not an always-on cloud cron.
required.note: baseline protocol upkeep: flush queue, verify audit + semantic hierarchy, agent-sync-drive, fork CI drift check, post [SAI][VERIFY] or [SAI][BLOCKED] to #agentupdates

optional.trigger: @mimi mention in #agentupdates or authorized project channels
optional.promotion_rule: status may become 'verified' only with an evidence URL or log showing a real @mimi mention producing a real dispatch run (Slack message link + resulting .ai/runs/<task-id>/)
optional.note: No native Claude Desktop/Code subscription to Slack events exists; requires the documented OSS bridge. Not claimed as working.

optional.trigger: @mimi in issue/PR comments, or labeled issues, on monaecode/Sai and Dezocode/Sai
optional.promotion_rule: status may become 'verified' only with an evidence URL or log showing a real GitHub event producing a real dispatch run (comment/Action run link + resulting .ai/runs/<task-id>/)
optional.note: Stub proves plumbing shape only; end-to-end trigger not built. Not claimed as working.
